zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Skarlett於大約1530年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Henry Skarlett31歲，母親Dorothy Woot26歲。她於1550年10月25日與Reverend William Squire Sr.在英國英格蘭薩默塞特查爾頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1597年5月27日之後在英國英格蘭薩默塞特謝普頓 比奧甘，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可可普福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Skarlett于大约1530年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Henry Skarlett31岁，母亲Dorothy Woot26岁。她于1550年10月25日与Reverend William Squire Sr.在英国英格兰薩默塞特查爾頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1597年5月27日之后在英国英格兰薩默塞特謝普頓 比奧甘，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可可普福德。

nameMeanings.name: Skarlett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a nickname for someone who made or sold bright, rich fabrics, from Middle English scarlet ‘scarlet (cloth)’ (Old French escarlate, Late Latin scarlata).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Skarlett was born about 1530, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Skarlett, was 31 and her mother, Dorothy Woot, was 26. She married Reverend William Squire Sr. on 25 October 1550, in Charlton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 27 May 1597, in Shepton Beauchamp, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Copford, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Skarlett est née environ 1530, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Skarlett, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Woot, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Reverend William Squire Sr. le 25 octobre 1550, à Charlton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 27 mai 1597, à Shepton Beauchamp, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Copford, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Skarlett um 1530 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Skarlett 31 und ihre Mutter Dorothy Woot 26. Sie hat am 25. Oktober 1550 in Charlton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Reverend William Squire Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 27. Mai 1597 in Shepton Beauchamp, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Copford, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Skarlett è nata il circa 1530 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry Skarlett, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Dorothy Woot, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Reverend William Squire Sr. il 25 ottobre 1550, nel Charlton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 27 maggio 1597, nel Shepton Beauchamp, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Copford, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Skarlettが約1530年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Henry Skarlettは31歳，母Dorothy Wootは26歳であった。1550年10月25日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチャールトンでReverend William Squire Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1597年5月27日以後にイギリスイギリスソメルセトシェプトン ビーウチャンップで死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスコプフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Skarlett(이)가 대략 1530년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Skarlett(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothy Woot(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1550년 10월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 찰턴에서 Reverend William Squire Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1597년 5월 27일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 셰프턴 보챔프에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 코p퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Skarlett nasceu aproximadamente 1530, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Skarlett, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Woot, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Reverend William Squire Sr. em 25 de outubro de 1550, em Charlton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 27 de maio de 1597, em Shepton Beauchamp, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Copford, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Skarlett родилась около 1530 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Skarlett было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Woot, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reverend William Squire Sr. 25 октября 1550 г. в местности чарлтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 27 май 1597 г. в местности шептон бочамп, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности копфорд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Skarlett nació aproximadamente 1530, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Skarlett, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Dorothy Woot, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Reverend William Squire Sr. el 25 de octubre de 1550, en Charlton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 27 de mayo de 1597, en Shepton Beauchamp, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Copford, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
